# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: MeshPolicy
metadata:
  name: enable-admin-interface
spec:
  match:
    namespaceSelector:
      matchExpressions:
      - key: kubernetes.io/cluster
        operator: In
        values:
        - istio-system
        - default
    labelSelector:
      matchLabels:
        app: any
  trafficPolicy:
    filterChains:
    - name: allow-all
      transportTlsMode: DISABLE
      hosts:
      - "*"
    - name: admin
      transportTlsMode: DISABLE
      ports:
      - number: 15000
        protocol: TCP
      rules:
      - action: ALLOW
      - action: DENY
        source:
          port: any
        destination:
          port: any
    tlsMode: DISABLE
    connectionPool:
      maxConnections: 20000
      tcpKeepAliveConfig:
        timeBetweenKeepAlives: "5s"
    http:
    - route:
      - destination:
          host: envoy
      port: 15000
      action: MATCH,REDIRECT
    tcp: {}
    udp: {}
  prometheus:
    promotedConfigReload: ENABLED
  validationFailureAction: WARN
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: enable-admin-endpoints
spec:
  host: envoy
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /config_dump
    - uri:
        prefix: /stats
    - uri:
        prefix: /clusters
    route:
    - destination:
        port:
          number: 15000
